article_meta.title: Politics Why Minnesotans Still Haven't Backed Down From Fighting ICE It's freezing

reasoning: Strong attribution compliance and several genuine author-prose bias findings. Some clear instances were missed and one notable mislabel (ad hominem labeled as Spin). Overall good but not perfect.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: All flagged items come from the author’s narration; no quoted or attributed source language was flagged.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Each flagged passage reflects loaded framing or evaluative language in the author’s own voice; none are neutral or merely factual.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed several salient author-level biases, e.g., the deck line ('It’s terrifying...'), the 'secret police... abduct them, disappear them' internal monologue, and 'police... stood menacingly'—all strong subjective/sensational phrasing.
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Most labels are defensible, but 'Whatever the bastards...' should be Mudslinging/Ad Hominem rather than Spin; a couple others could arguably fit Unsubstantiated/Opinion-as-fact rather than Spin.
